# Bitsocial AI Moderation Challenge

> Bitsocial AI Moderation Challenge evaluates Bitsocial comment content against community rules through an OpenAI-compatible model endpoint.

This file is generated by `scripts/generate-llms-files.mjs`. Do not hand-edit it; update the source docs or generator config, then run `yarn llms:generate`.

## Canonical Links

- [Repository](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/ai-moderation-challenge)
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@bitsocial/ai-moderation-challenge)
- [Bitsocial protocol](https://bitsocial.net)
- [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/ai-moderation-challenge/blob/master/llms-full.txt): Expanded inline corpus generated from the curated source docs.

## Critical Context

- This package runs on a community node and does not require a hosted moderation server.
- Private production prompts and API keys must stay outside the public repository.
- Moderation behavior is fail-closed where AGENTS.md and tests say so; verify against source before changing policy.

## Source Of Truth

- Code, tests, package manifests, source docs, and live/runtime evidence when relevant are source of truth.
- This generated file is compiled context for orientation. Verify behavioral claims against source files before editing or concluding.
- Repo-managed AI instructions live in `AGENTS.md` and any directory-specific `AGENTS.md` files.

## Core Documents

- [@bitsocial/ai-moderation-challenge](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/ai-moderation-challenge/blob/master/README.md): Automatic PKC challenge that evaluates Bitsocial comment content against `community.rules` with an OpenAI-compatible model endpoint. The package runs on the community node and does not require a hosted Bitsocial moder...
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/ai-moderation-challenge/blob/master/AGENTS.md): This file defines the always-on rules for AI agents working on `@bitsocial/ai-moderation-challenge`. Use this as the default policy. Load linked playbooks only when their trigger condition applies.
- [src/AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/ai-moderation-challenge/blob/master/src/AGENTS.md): These rules apply to `src/**`. Follow the repo-root `AGENTS.md` first, then use this file for runtime challenge code.
- [tests/AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/ai-moderation-challenge/blob/master/tests/AGENTS.md): These rules apply to `tests/**`. Follow the repo-root `AGENTS.md` first, then use this file for Vitest coverage.
- [Known Surprises](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/ai-moderation-challenge/blob/master/docs/agent-playbooks/known-surprises.md): This file tracks repository-specific confusion points that caused agent mistakes.
- [Long-Running Agent Workflow](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/ai-moderation-challenge/blob/master/docs/agent-playbooks/long-running-agent-workflow.md): Use this playbook when a task is likely to span multiple sessions, handoffs, or spawned agents.
- [Bug Investigation Workflow](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/ai-moderation-challenge/blob/master/docs/agent-playbooks/bug-investigation.md): Use this when a bug is reported in a specific file, line, stack trace, or code block.
- [Skills and Tools](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/ai-moderation-challenge/blob/master/docs/agent-playbooks/skills-and-tools.md): Use this playbook when setting up or adjusting skills and external tooling.
